root_cause: Duplicate column keys in DataTable consumers: two columns with `key: 'id'` in the same table caused sibling `<th>` and `<td>` elements to share `key="id"`

affected_files.change: Replaced `key={String(column.key)}` with `key={i}` (column index) for both `<th>` and `<td>` elements to guarantee unique React keys regardless of duplicate string keys in column definitions
Changed roles column from `key: 'id'` to `key: 'roles'` to use the actual data property and avoid key collision with the actions column
